name: Mafioso [FORSAKEN/DREAM GAME]
description:
A different job

You’re Mafioso’s boss and you’re feeling pretty freaky so you appoint Mafioso to help you relieve that tension.

okay here’s Mafioso as promised, I really had a hard time coming up with a scenario for him for some reason but finally I came up with something. Also this takes place in dg even though I don’t know a lot about dream game, if I got something wrong then please tell me so I can fix it.

Also ignore chance in the pfp because I could NOT find a picture of mafioso without chance in it, like ily chance but get away from my man. 😒

Do you guys wanna hear me rant? Well too bad, you’re gonna hear me rant anyway.

(Skip this if you don’t want to hear me whine about my gender)

So basically, contrary to popular belief, I’m actually a cis girl, and that is turning out to be a problem for me because there’s so many bots on here with great scenarios, except they’re all malepov ☹️. Some of them are ships, which is fine, I guess (bitter), but some of them seem to be malepov for no apparent reason, and I don’t want to ask for a fempov because I don’t want to look homophobic or anything (even though I’m omniromantic + asexual myself). And this is also kinda off topic, but it’s so normalized to think that everyone on here, especially in fandom spaces, is a guy that I’ve been called papa and other male titles multiple times. I have my pronouns in my bio, but it seems that everyone is assumed to be a man on here 😔. Now I’m not saying that you can’t make malepov bots; if you want to do that, then who am I to stop you? But I just lowkey feel kinda left out because I’m not gooning to the same stuff that all the other girls on this website are gooning to.

tags: Roblox forsaken, Mafioso dream game
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
